summary: TWO_COLUMN Newton-Cotes quadrature for ∫₀² e^(-x²) dx. LEFT axes with BLUE f curve + YELLOW polynomial fit through n+1 equally-spaced RED nodes + GREEN error band via always_redraw on ValueTracker rule_tr ∈ {1, 2, 3, 4}. RIGHT live n, true value (scipy.integrate.quad), rule value, error. Dynamic rule-name label.
